entities.name: ASIAN RICE
entities.description: Oryza sativa, the host plant studied in the experiment

entities.name: MELOIDOGYNE GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: A root-knot nematode pathogen

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to limit the population growth of the pathogen

entities.name: TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to maintain growth and yield despite infection

entities.name: GLASSHOUSE EXPERIMENT
entities.description: The controlled environment setup used to examine pathogen pressure

entities.name: HIGH INITIAL POPULATION DENSITY
entities.description: High levels of second-stage juveniles (Pi = 25,000 to 100,000 plant-1)

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINES
entities.description: Lines derived from crossing resistant and susceptible parents

entities.name: IR78877-208-B-1-2
entities.description: A resistant and tolerant donor parent genotype of Asian rice

entities.name: IR64
entities.description: A susceptible and highly sensitive recipient parent genotype of Asian rice

entities.name: DINORADO
entities.description: A susceptible and highly sensitive recipient parent genotype of Asian rice

entities.name: ROOT POPULATION DENSITY
entities.description: The density of nematodes within the root system

entities.name: ROOT GALL INDEX
entities.description: A measure of the severity of root galling caused by nematodes

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH
entities.description: The overall physical development of the plant

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The agricultural productivity of the plant

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical measurement of the plant

entities.name: ROOT WEIGHT
entities.description: The mass of the plant's root system

entities.name: SHOOT WEIGHT
entities.description: The mass of the plant's above-ground parts

entities.name: NUMBER OF PANICLES
entities.description: The count of panicles per plant

entities.name: PERCENT FILLED GRAINS
entities.description: The percentage of grains that are filled per plant

entities.name: BATANGAS
entities.description: A region in the Philippines where the nematode population was sourced

entities.name: PHILIPPINES
entities.description: The country where Batangas is located
